title: biscutella didyma var. lyrata
intro: Biscutella didyma var. lyrata, also known as Lyrata Biscuitroot, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, white, and fragrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lyrata Biscuitroot are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Lyrata Biscuitroot can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its roots in hot water, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine.
